description: Canonical View custom Data List form page layout for viewing the current item plus related business context. It includes page_title_section and kpi_metrics_wrapper and may host approved Dashboard/Data Analytics/Collection golden reference components inside allowed slots.
proofBoundary: Export-shaped custom Data List form layout template parsed from the user-provided Data list page layouts.ydl. Runtime rendering and generated app field/action binding still require generated-final and browser proof.
lockedRule: All containers and controls outside the allowed business-content containers must preserve the exported template structure, style, layout, typography, width, padding, background, gap, direction, and control types. New layout modules may only be added by copying an allowed repeatable/removable module from this template.
editableRule: Business-specific fields, Dynamic controls, related-data regions, analytics, Collection templates, labels, descriptions, and configured actions may be inserted only inside the allowed business-content containers. Generated IDs, field bindings, and action payloads are created at generation time and must not be planned in the App Plan.
